title: The Functional Hierarchy of Green IT
description: A flowchart illustrating how core Green IT functionalities build upon each other to achieve sustainability goals.
relationships: Energy-Efficient Hardware enables Virtualization & Resource Consolidation
Virtualization & Resource Consolidation and Power Management Software are managed by Sustainable Software Design
All lower-level functions feed into E-Waste Management strategies
Cloud & Shared Infrastructure is the operational model that encompasses and optimizes all other functionalities
